positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration featuring bioluminescent deep-sea flora and cosmic constellations intertwining with stylized mountain silhouettes. The composition should be centered and highly graphic, rendered in the style of Art Nouveau etching meets futuristic Japanese woodblock print. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight blues, vibrant electric cyan, neon magenta, and stark matte black. The subject matter should have clean silhouettes and strong line work, suitable for repeating apparel prints. Minimalist yet complex, high detail, symmetrical balance, clean edges, vibrant glow effect.
negative: blur, noisy, low resolution, artifacts, signature, watermark, text, writing, poor anatomy, bad composition, sloppy, messy, duplicate, excessive detail, grain, cross-hatching, logo, trademark, copyright, celebrity
